vocab.meaning: một tập thể gắn kết/thống nhất
vocab.example: Through months of rigorous practice, our basketball team eventually transformed into a cohesive unit.

vocab.meaning: cải thiện/thúc đẩy tinh thần đồng đội
vocab.example: A good captain knows exactly how to bolster team morale when we are trailing behind in a match.

vocab.meaning: sự thành thạo về mặt chiến thuật
vocab.example: Our coach focused heavily on tactical proficiency rather than just raw physical strength.

vocab.meaning: trách nhiệm lẫn nhau/trách nhiệm chung
vocab.example: Being in a sports team fosters a sense of mutual accountability, as every player's performance affects the outcome.

vocab.meaning: đoàn kết vì một mục tiêu chung
vocab.example: It was inspiring to see how players from different backgrounds could unite behind a common goal.

vocab.meaning: sự khích lệ từ bạn bè/đồng trang lứa
vocab.example: I found that peer encouragement was far more motivating than any criticism from the sidelines.

vocab.meaning: trải qua quá trình huấn luyện khắt khe
vocab.example: During the summer, we had to undergo rigorous training sessions to prepare for the regional championships.

vocab.meaning: thể hiện tinh thần thể thao (cao thượng)
vocab.example: Even after a bitter defeat, it is crucial for a team to demonstrate sportsmanship by congratulating the winners.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác thuộc về một nơi nào đó/tập thể nào đó
vocab.example: Joining the swimming squad gave me a sense of belonging that I hadn't found in other school activities.

vocab.meaning: đồng bộ hóa các chuyển động
vocab.example: In rowing, you must synchronize movements perfectly with your teammates to achieve maximum speed.
